title: A1plus
summary: Alplus or A1+ (Armenian: Ա1+) is an independent Armenian media network. Until 2002, it had a TV channel which was closed by the government of Robert Kocharyan. Now it is present online at www.a1plus.am.
text: Alplus or A1+ (Armenian: Ա1+) is an independent Armenian media network. Until 2002, it had a TV channel which was closed by the government of Robert Kocharyan. Now it is present online at www.a1plus.am.
